meta.title: B2B Clinical Raw Materials | AmberNord
meta.description: Certified sea buckthorn raw materials in bulk for the food, cosmetics and pharmaceutical industries. ISO 22000 and EU Organic certified.

og.title: B2B Raw Materials & Clinical Extracts | AmberNord
og.description: Direct access to certified sea buckthorn raw essences for premium brands and the food industry.

header.lead: Direct access to our exclusive raw essences for the food industry, cosmetic brands, longevity centres and visionary companies.

masterBox.h2:
The Master Box –
For uncompromising focus.
masterBox.p1: Integrate the AmberNord protocol into your practice or company. Our exclusive 20-bottle edition offers tailored partnerships for longevity centres, biohacking facilities and visionary corporate teams investing in true cognitive performance.
masterBox.p2: Uncompromisingly authentic nutrient profile and organic-certified purity, unique on the European market.

logo.alt: EU Organic – certified seal for ecological farming

products.heading: 100% Sea Buckthorn Elixir
products.body: The undiluted, nature-pure elixir as a base for premium products. Including natural pulp and native oils for maximum nutrient density.

products.heading: Native Sea Buckthorn Oils
products.body: Highly concentrated botanical lipids from isolated seed and pulp extraction for maximum bioavailability.

specs.val: Deep-red pulp oil (Omega-7) & seed oil (Omega-3/-6 balance)

products.heading: Sea Buckthorn Powder & Press Residues
products.body: 100% natural, produced from ground seeds and berry husks after oil extraction. A valuable source of fibre and protein with no additives.

specs.val: Rich in vitamins (A, B2, C, E), free from E-numbers

products.heading: Sea Buckthorn Leaves & Seeds
products.body: High-quality dried material with strong antioxidant properties. Seeds for oil production and leaves as a functional tea or extract.

specs.val: Very high content of Omega-3 and Omega-6

products.heading: Sea Buckthorn Bark & Juice Powder
products.body: Botanical remedies and highly concentrated superfoods. Freeze-dried juice powder and serotonin-rich bark for specialised applications.

specs.val: Contains phyto-serotonin, ideal for tinctures & ointments
Freeze-dried, maximum preservation of Vitamin C & Omegas

steps.title: Manual Harvest
steps.text: Precise hand-picking by 100+ specialists prevents mechanical damage to the delicate berry skin.

steps.title: Immediate Processing
steps.text: Processing within 24–48 hours guarantees maximum nutrient density and prevents oxidation.

steps.title: Cold Pressing
steps.text: Gentle mechanical separation without heat or aggressive solvents – 100% hexane-free.

steps.title: Zero-Waste System
steps.text: Holistic use of the entire plant (elixir, oil, powder, bark) for an uncompromisingly sustainable supply chain.

rows.industry: Mixed varieties from the global market

cta.heading: Start with AmberNord
cta.body: Certified raw materials for uncompromising products.
